title: Psycopg migration capture path

human_summary.content: Local database migration cards need a bounded capture and search path.
human_summary.redaction_summary: Removed private paths, hostnames, usernames, env values, and raw logs.

problem_summary: The local database migration search fixture needed a reusable capture path.
solution_summary: Apply the current migrations, keep the sanitized body in the local side table, and search with the bounded task profile.
lessons: Keep local private bodies in the side table.
